{{CargoRelic
|name=Dogbot Badge
|class_id=20305
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This badge once belonged to a CyberVendorian Dogbot. These diesel-powered machines are rather underprivileged on their planet. They resented the Catbots for taking over too many resources and formed a resistance to fight them. The homeworld has almost been completely destroyed in the endless war.
|fame=14
|art=16
|fth=16
|civ=17
|tech=27
|ss1=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +2<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss2=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +4<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss3=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss4=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss7=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150<br> (Awakened)
}}
